Entry: Company registry - Singapore - data.gov.sg ACRA (direct API, shipped)
Provider ToS notes: Singapore Open Data Licence v1.0. Commercial reuse permitted with attribution. Free, no signup required. Rate limit 4 calls / 10s unauthenticated; 8/10s with dev key; 20/10s with prod key.
Doctrine reference: DEC-20260428-A Tier 2 (statutory public records, direct API path)
Notes:
✅ SHIPPED 2026-04-29 (commit bd25bc5). Singapore was previously deactivated in auto-register.ts as 'No viable data source identified' (the executor scraped opencorporates.com — Tier-1 violation). Migrated to direct data.gov.sg CKAN datastore_search API against the 'Entities Registered with ACRA' dataset.

Resource: d_3f960c10fed6145404ca7b821f263b87. ~2.1M entities, monthly refresh. Singapore Open Data Licence v1.0 (commercial reuse permitted with attribution). No signup required.

Fields returned: entity_name, uen, entity_type, status, is_active, issuance_agency, uen_issue_date, registered_street, registered_postal_code, registered_address (composed), jurisdiction. 11 structured fields.

Known limitations (in manifest):
- Address is street + postal code only; building number/unit not in dataset (those require ACRA BizFile+).
- Monthly refresh cadence — sub-month filings lag.
- No directors / shareholders / beneficial owners / financials (BizFile+ paid lookup).
- Sole-proprietor names are personal data — must not be reused for direct marketing.

Provenance: acquisition_method=direct_api, source=data.gov.sg, license='Singapore Open Data Licence v1.0', attribution='Accounting and Corporate Regulatory Authority (ACRA) — Entities Registered with ACRA, via data.gov.sg'.

Verified end-to-end: smoke 11/11 against Singapore Airlines Limited (UEN 197200078R). SQS 28.9 rising.

Rate limits: unauthenticated 4 calls / 10s — sufficient for our volume; can register for higher tier later if needed.

Tier 2 coverage: 4/5 (directors via Bolagsverket; VAT via VIES routing)
Provider ToS notes: VERIFIED 2026-04-22. Commercial use and redistribution permitted. The HVD API is part of Bolagsverket's värdefulla datamängder released 2025-02-03 under EU Commission Implementing Regulation (EU) 2023/138 and the Swedish Öppna datalagen. Bolagsverket states explicitly: (a) avgiftsfritt — no fees; (b) inget avtal — no contract required; (c) 'Du får använda dessa data fritt för kommersiella och icke-kommersiella syften, exempelvis för att skapa nya tjänster eller produkter'; (d) modification, processing, and combination with other sources allowed. Legal basis requires HVD datasets to be licensed under CC0 or CC BY 4.0 (or equivalent less restrictive). Attribution to Bolagsverket as source likely required — must be confirmed against the specific license tag in their dataset metadata, but CC BY 4.0 is the default assumption. Rate limit: 60 requests/minute per client. Embed-and-bill: permitted by construction — HVD mandate explicitly allows building commercial services and products on top of the data, which covers Strale's embed-of-match-result model. Constraints to respect: GDPR/personuppgifter (no issue for corporate registry data), sekretess (not applicable to public registry fields), attribution requirement (add 'Källa: Bolagsverket' to provenance metadata).
Notes: 2026-05-15 identity audit Batch 1 confirmed SE functional via Bolagsverket HVD API. Direct API, authoritative, free. Canonical SE source.

Provider ToS notes: Openapi ToS blocks embed-and-bill on standard terms — see IT row for full audit. ES bundled with IT for the Openapi commercial conversation. Fallback: Creditsafe aggregator scope. Current Browserless path stays until sanctioned path lands.
Doctrine reference: Openapi addendum (countersignature pending); ES direct integration via Registradores queued as v1.1 quality upgrade
Notes: v3 + v2 probes 2026-05-15: Telefónica + Iberdrola both 200 via ES-start AND ES-advanced. NIF letter+digits accepted. ES-advanced (€0.05 + 22% IT VAT = €0.061/call) adds NACE/NAICS/SIC + 4-year balance sheets (employees, netWorth, operatingRevenue, equity, totalAssets) over WW-Top. Within Strale price band. NO directors/officers/shareholders — IT-only product. CORRECTED 2026-05-16 post Phase 2b empirical probe: balanceSheets[] has NO shareCapital field (IT-Advanced-only); T3 reflects NACE + last_filing_date only. Direct Registradores integration (authoritative source + directors + share capital) queued for v1.1.

Entry: Company registry - Italy - Openapi.com (IT-Advanced, rich path, live-verified 2026-05-15)
Tier 2 coverage: 4/5 via IT-Advanced (vatCode + source-as-of + source-name + authoritative-flag=false; no directors at IT-Advanced tier — managers[] is IT-Full only, deferred to v1.1)
Tier 3 coverage: 4/6 via IT-Advanced (shareHolders[] + atecoClassification/NACE + balanceSheets[].shareCapital + balanceSheets[].balanceSheetDate); subsidiaries + affiliateCompanies deferred to v1.1 IT-Full; UBOs via UBO-Italy product candidate
Provider ToS notes: Openapi ToS: 'Content cannot be reused until obtaining written consent from Openapi' (Terms of Use). Sister-domain ToS explicitly prohibits resale/redistribution. Italian corporate agreement has strict prefectural-license and privacy-law restrictions on third-party transmission. NOT standard self-serve for embed-and-bill; requires explicit written permission from Openapi or fallback to Creditsafe aggregator. Current Browserless path stays until sanctioned path lands.
Doctrine reference: Openapi IT product line (IT-Advanced); native Italian aggregator. IT-Full + UBO-Italy products deferred to v1.1 (IT-Full requires async execution architecture, out of v1 sync scope).
Notes: v2 + v4 probes 2026-05-15 + Phase 2c live validation 2026-05-16: Eni at codice fiscale 00484960588 returned 200 across IT-Start/IT-Advanced/IT-Full. IT-Advanced (€0.10 PAYG + 22% IT VAT = €0.122/call) has shareHolders[] array, detailedLegalForm (closes T1 legal_form gap — IT is the only Openapi-routed country reaching T1=7/7), atecoClassification, 4-year balanceSheets[] with shareCapital field (unique to IT-Advanced; NOT in ES/PT-Advanced per Phase 2b empirical). T3 structural = 4/6; per-entity outcomes vary by ownership structure (Eni shareHolders[] correctly empty in Phase 2c live smoke — widely-held / publicly-traded, no shareholder above 5%/10% threshold; closely-held SrLs return populated array). Manifest declares shareholders reliability=common (entity-dependent) per Phase 2c PR #124. IT-Full (€0.45+, 12s latency, async only) adds managers[] (directors), subsidiaries[], affiliateCompanies[] — deferred to v1.1 as quality upgrade; sync v1 ships IT-Advanced only. UBO-Italy separate product not probed; v1.1 candidate.
